system.description:
Follow my orders, and together we shall march towards victory.

LEVEL 3

Rallying Cry. Whenever you use a Commander's Order, all allies within Reach 12 that can hear you gain advantage on their next attack (1/round).

New Orders. Add Watch Out!, Hit The Weak Spot! and Shake It Off! to the list of available Commander's Orders. Choose another Commander's Order.

  • Watch Out! 1 action. (1/encounter) Reaction (when an ally within Reach 12 is attacked): Cause the attack targeting your ally to miss.

  • Hit the Weak Spot! 1 action. Reaction (as an ally within Reach 12 attacks an enemy): Your ally's attack ignores Armor.

  • Shake It Off! 1 action. Action/Reaction (on an ally's turn): Target ally within Reach 12 is cured of either Charmed, Dazed, Frightened or Taunted.

LEVEL 7

Listen Up! Your Commander's Orders that target an ally or enemy may affect one additional valid target. Choose another Commander's Order.

LEVEL 11

Powerful Voice. Whenever you use a Commander's Order, all adjacent enemies become Frightened of you until the end of their next turn (1/round).

LEVEL 15

Master and Commander. All Commander's Orders with a usage limit may be used an additional time each encounter. You know all Commander's Orders.
